title: Concrete Plus
body: # **Important** All minecraft versions after 1.20 will have the mod versions be 1.0.0 as I am restarting the version number. ## What is Concrete Plus Concrete Plus is a straightforward Minecraft mod that expands the existing concrete block family by introducing new block variants in all available colors. This simple addition provides players with more options for building and decorating their Minecraft world, making it a must-have for anyone who wants to add a touch of variety to their gameplay experience. ## What does Concrete Plus currently have - Slabs - Vertical Slabs - Stairs - Fences - Fence gates - Walls - Tiles - Panes - Doors (Both powered and unpowered) - Trapdoors (Both powered and unpowered) - Pressure plates (Both weighted and unweighted) - Buttons ## wanna support me
